messages.content: In Java, using the Streams API, filter a List<Integer> to even numbers and collect them into a new list.
How do I compose two CompletableFutures in Java so the second runs when the first completes successfully?
When should I use a Java record instead of a regular class? Show a tiny example of a Coordinate record.
Write a Java generic method <T extends Comparable<T>> max(List<T> items) that returns the largest item.
How do I safely get a User's email from a Optional<User> in Java, defaulting to 'unknown@example.com' if absent?
